title: Magic Square
description: Schema for the Mermin-Peres magic square game benchmark. Uses four qubits in two shared Bell pairs; Alice's two qubits implement the row measurements and Bob's two qubits implement the column measurements.

benchmark_name.description: Name of the benchmark. Must be 'Magic Square' for this schema.

shots.description: Number of measurement shots per (r, c) circuit. The reported win probability averages over the nine (r, c) inputs.

alice_qubits.description: Two physical qubit indices for Alice's register.

bob_qubits.description: Two physical qubit indices for Bob's register. Must be disjoint from alice_qubits.
